analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE (combined cohort requires TCGA+DKFZ not deposited)
discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: From Supp Fig 1d, the reported silhouette width for the combined MPNST cohort (n=54) is 0.60. The model was unable to reproduce this value.

B. REPORTED vs MODEL: Reported = 0.60 (silhouette width for combined MPNST, n=54, from Supp Fig 1d). Model = DATA_UNAVAILABLE. The model could not compute the silhouette width because the combined cohort analysis requires methylation data from multiple sources (TCGA and DKFZ) that are not deposited in the local data directory.

C. COHORT: The paper's Supp Fig 1d reports a silhouette width computed on a combined MPNST cohort of n=54 samples drawn from Toronto (deposited locally) plus TCGA and DKFZ (external). Only the Toronto cohort is available in the local data_dir.

D. COMPUTATION ATTEMPTED: Silhouette width for methylation-based clustering of the combined n=54 MPNST cohort could not be computed because the TCGA and DKFZ methylation data (required to reach n=54) are external and not present in the deposited local data. The Toronto-only cohort does not match the n=54 denominator.

E. ROOT CAUSE: The data required to reproduce this statistic (TCGA + DKFZ methylation arrays) is not deposited locally. This is a pre-analytical data-availability issue, not an analytical difference. Classification: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING.

F. PROPOSED FIX: To reproduce this value, one would need to download the TCGA MPNST methylation dataset (e.g., from GDC/TCGA-SARC cohort) and the DKFZ MPNST methylation data (e.g., from GSE accession referenced in the paper), preprocess with the same pipeline (noob/funnorm normalization), combine with the Toronto Illumina EPIC/450k beta matrix, apply the same feature selection (top variable probes by MAD or similar), perform the same clustering (hierarchical or ConsensusClusterPlus), and compute silhouette width with cluster::silhouette() using the same distance metric (typically 1 - Pearson correlation or Euclidean). Only then can the 0.60 value be compared.

G. CONFIDENCE: HIGH that the root cause is missing external data (TCGA + DKFZ not deposited). The question explicitly refers to combined MPNST n=54 which by construction requires the external cohorts.
proposed_fix: Obtain TCGA MPNST methylation data (TCGA-SARC) and DKFZ MPNST methylation data (referenced GSE accession), combine with deposited Toronto methylation data to form the n=54 cohort, run the same clustering pipeline (normalization, feature selection, hierarchical or ConsensusClusterPlus clustering), and compute silhouette width with cluster::silhouette() using the paper's distance metric.
